original_snippet_context: Stock prices from the London Stock Exchange
relevant_quote: Os titulos brasileiros cotados na Bolsa de Londres foram os seguintes em ouro:—Fundos Antecipaveis conversiveis com emprestimo de 1889 e emprestimo de 1902 a 100.... 76
justification: This snippet provides information about Brazilian bonds traded on the London Stock Exchange. While "conversivel" is mentioned, it refers to the bond type, not the Caixa de Conversão or its related monetary policy debate.
